addon.name: Axolync Spotify Addon
addon.description: Stage 1 Spotify-backed SongMetadata addon for canonical duration enrichment.

adapters.label: Spotify SongMetadata
adapters.description: Stage 1 Spotify-backed SongMetadata adapter for canonical duration enrichment.

settings.label: Client ID
settings.description: Spotify client credentials app client id used for addon-owned token acquisition.

settings.label: Client Secret
settings.description: Spotify client credentials app client secret used for addon-owned token acquisition.

settings.label: Default Market
settings.description: Fallback Spotify market used when the accepted match does not preserve one.

settings.label: Allow Search Fallback
settings.description: Allow bounded Spotify artist/title search when direct Spotify track identity is unavailable or unusable.
